title: The More Plates More Dates podcast with Derek!

chunks.title: Personal Review of Skin, Hair, and Nails Supplement
chunks.summary: Alyssa shares her positive experience with a skin, hair, and nails supplement combined with a switch to an animal-based diet, noting significant improvements in her skin condition and overall health. She discusses how this lifestyle change has helped her with issues like stretch marks and hair growth.
chunks.transcript: i'm in shock check out this review from alyssa a on our skin hair and nails from heart and swell supplements melissa says i've never written a review in my life but i just had to with this stuff i've been taking skin hair nails along with a smaller dose of beef organs for only about three weeks along with switching to a more animal-based diet cutting out seed oils gluten cruciferous vegetables etc and i swear the stretch marks i've had for eight plus years are fading away

chunks.title: Benefits of An Animal-Based Diet
chunks.summary: The speaker highlights anecdotal evidence about the benefits of an animal-based diet for skin regrowth and autoimmune conditions such as alopecia areata. They share reviews and experiences from individuals who have seen improvements after switching to a diet rich in animal products.

chunks.title: Understanding Organ Hierarchy in Diet
chunks.summary: The speaker outlines the dietary hierarchy of organ meats, suggesting that liver should be the primary organ consumed, followed by heart and other organs. They discuss the nutritional benefits of these organ meats and how they relate to overall health.
